docDescriptors.title: Corpus Atlas and Reading Guide
docDescriptors.purpose: Onboard readers and define corpus navigation pathways.
completionChecks: All source areas are indexed
At least three persona reading paths exist
All D01 links resolve to existing docs

docDescriptors.title: Executive Technical Synthesis
docDescriptors.purpose: Provide white-paper-ready top-level narrative and thesis.
completionChecks: Each major claim references at least one deeper doc
Narrative includes differentiators
No unresolved contradiction with D11

docDescriptors.title: Conceptual Model and Terminology
docDescriptors.purpose: Normalize Tier-1 terminology and core concepts.
completionChecks: Tier-1 terms have single canonical definitions
Conflicting synonyms are resolved or logged
Referenced terms are used consistently in D01-D12

docDescriptors.title: JSDoc Semantic System and Tag Taxonomy
docDescriptors.purpose: Explain canonical JSDoc model, taxonomy semantics, and constraints.
completionChecks: All tag classes are represented
Applicability and derivability rules are documented
Examples include deterministic and bounded-uncertain cases

docDescriptors.title: Codegraph Architecture and Dataflow
docDescriptors.purpose: Describe end-to-end architecture, boundaries, and phase dataflow.
completionChecks: Every stage has input/output contracts
Dependencies and control flow are explicit
Architecture claims map to evidence

docDescriptors.title: Deterministic Extraction and Enrichment Methods
docDescriptors.purpose: Detail deterministic extraction, narrowing, and validation methods.
completionChecks: Method steps are reproducible
Boundary conditions are explicit
Validation pathways are documented

docDescriptors.title: NLP, Reasoning, and Knowledge Representation Strategy
docDescriptors.purpose: Capture inference strategy, representation policy, and guardrails.
completionChecks: Inference claims are status-labeled
Reasoning constraints are explicit
Retrieval budgeting and tradeoffs are captured

docDescriptors.title: Interfaces, Schemas, and Contract Catalog
docDescriptors.purpose: Catalog externally relevant interfaces and schema contracts.
completionChecks: Every interface includes owner and invariants
Contract examples are provided
Contract claims have evidence references

docDescriptors.title: Operations, Reliability, and Control Planes
docDescriptors.purpose: Consolidate operational reliability model and control-plane runbooks.
completionChecks: Runbook-level actions are present
Failure scenarios include mitigation paths
Operational claims include evidence links

docDescriptors.title: Validation, Metrics, and Audit Evidence
docDescriptors.purpose: Define measurable quality, formulas, and audit evidence pathways.
completionChecks: All metrics have explicit formulas
Audit artifacts are mapped to metrics
Evidence route is defined for each quality claim

docDescriptors.title: Risks, Open Decisions, and Roadmap
docDescriptors.purpose: Make uncertainty explicit with owned risk and decision governance.
completionChecks: Every open decision has owner and deadline
Every risk has trigger and mitigation
Known reliability notes are explicitly tracked

docDescriptors.title: Traceability Annex and Evidence Index
docDescriptors.purpose: Guarantee source-to-claim traceability and evidence integrity.
completionChecks: All major claims are linked to evidence IDs
Traceability matrix covers all source areas
Integrity checks identify and resolve broken links
